## Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Start here, not with the implementation. -->

<!-- How could the platform address this? If you have a concrete design, describe it. If not, outline the shape of the solution. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else have you tried, or what other approaches rejected and why? -->

## Impact

- **Who benefits:** <!-- which roles or install modes -->
- **Risk or trade-offs:** <!-- what does this complicate? -->

## Related
